result.stderr:
quoll 1.3
Copyright © Jerry Bian 2022

  -y, --yes             (Default: false) Confirmation for deletion.

  -n, --name            Filter by glob pattern file names. Multiple names can be
                        separated by comma. Default to *.

  -f, --folder          Filter by glob pattern folder names. Multiple names can
                        be separated by comma. Default not to delete folders,
                        unless --remove-empty-dir specified.

  -s, --size            Filter by file size(less than or equals), valid strings
                        are xxB, xxKB, xxMB, xxGB.

  -b, --backup          Save to backup location before deletion.

  --from-file           File paths to delete. One file path per line.

  -r, --recursive       Include sub directories. Default to false.

  --remove-empty-dir    Remove all empty folders.

  --help                Display this help screen.

  --version             Display version information.

  dir (pos. 0)          The target folder. Default to current folder.
